title: CHANGELOG rc.24 entry + version bump to v2.0.0-rc.24
description: Cut v2.0.0-rc.24 release: bump version across root + all workspace package.json files (root + cli + server + shared), update CHANGELOG.md with rc.24 entry covering all 12 tasks + breaking-change migration note (fab uninstall && fab install required), verify version-sync (fab -v matches package.json), run full gates (typecheck + lint + test). Follow release-rc skill from memory (it was created to prevent rc.7/rc.12/rc.13 fix-forward cascades and rc.18 desync bug).

files.change:
Prepend new entry:

## v2.0.0-rc.24 — 2026-XX-XX

### Highlights

Cite contract policy — `[recalled]` cites on decisions/pitfalls类 KB now require operator-based commitment. Doctor compares commitments against session edit diff to detect actual rule violations (not just hallucinated ids).

### Features

- **Cite contract syntax (5 operators)**: `→ edit:<glob> / !edit:<glob> / require:<symbol> / forbid:<symbol> / skip:<reason>` appended to cite line (TASK-02)
- **Schema bump**: `cite_commitments` parallel array on assistant_turn_observed + new `cite_contract_policy_activated` marker event (TASK-01)
- **Shared parser lib**: cite-line-parser module consumed by cc/codex/cursor hooks via inline-bundle (TASK-03, TASK-04)
- **Stop hook soft reminder**: warns when decisions/pitfalls cite missing contract (non-blocking) (TASK-05)
- **Doctor contract metrics**: per-(layer,type) cross-tab, hard_violated detection, cite_id_unresolved bucket, skip reason histogram (TASK-06, TASK-07, TASK-08, TASK-09)
- **`--layer` filter**: fab doctor --cite-coverage --layer=team|personal|all (TASK-10)
- **Personal layer parity**: BOOTSTRAP mentions KP-* entries, violations split team/personal in report

### Breaking (require fab install rerun)

- BOOTSTRAP byte content updated (cite policy section extended with contract syntax)
- Hook templates updated (cite-line parser inlined; emits cite_commitments structured field)

### Migration

After upgrade, rerun `fab uninstall && fab install` to sync bootstrap + hooks across all 3 clients (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Cursor). Until reinstall completes, `fab doctor --cite-coverage` shows `contract_check: skipped (bootstrap drift — run fab install)` — this is expected (B5-α drift gate).

### Deferred to rc.25+

- LLM-judge path for guidelines/processes類 KB (semantic rules)
- User-level cite-policy override (~/.fabric/AGENTS.md)
- Operator vocabulary expansion (sequencing/conditional) — data-driven from skip:<reason> ratio

### Tasks

12 tasks across 4 waves: schema+bootstrap → hook parsers → doctor service → CLI+release.

implementation: Bump version across all 4 package.json files (use rg/Edit to update each).
Verify version-sync: run `fab -v` (after rebuild) — must report 2.0.0-rc.24.
Run typecheck: `pnpm typecheck` — expect zero errors.
Run lint: `pnpm lint` — expect zero errors.
Run full test: `pnpm test` — expect zero failures.
Prepend CHANGELOG entry per files[].change directive (fill in actual release date YYYY-MM-DD).
Stage all changes + commit with conventional title: `chore(rc24): bump to v2.0.0-rc.24 — cite contract policy`.
Per release-rc skill: do not push until user confirms; this task ends at local tag creation.

reference.examples: rc.22 commit fe4e186 (bump rc.22), rc.23 commit 434319c (bump rc.23) — same shape.

rationale.chosen_approach: Standard RC bump per memory release-rc skill. Single commit for version+CHANGELOG, separate from feature commits (TASK-01 through TASK-11).
alternatives_considered: Squash all into one mega-commit (rejected: violates per-task commit convention)
Skip CHANGELOG (rejected: required by release process)
decision_factors: release-rc skill explicitly created for this
User memory explicitly prefers per-task commits
rationale.tradeoffs: 13-commit chain (12 features + 1 release); acceptable per rc.20.
